description: Treat partially-constructed Hadamard matrix as a factor graph. Variable nodes are entries, factor nodes enforce pairwise row orthogonality. Apply belief propagation or survey propagation to iteratively refine assignments. Borrows from LDPC decoding.
mathematical_formalization: Factor graph: v_{ij} in {-1,+1}, f_{rs} = delta(sum_k v_{rk}*v_{sk}, 0). BP messages iterate until convergence. Decimation fixes high-confidence variables.
analogical_connections: Survey propagation ~ spin glass cavity method
implementation_hypothesis: Initialize near-Hadamard matrix. BP on violated constraints. Damped BP with momentum. Decimation of confident variables. Repeat.
experiment_seed: Random 668x668 start. BP + decimation for 1000 iterations. Track violated constraints vs iteration.
